subcodes.first_line: O Zayn! The Lord of Causes and Sovereign of Nations doth remember thee upon the Mountain, as a grace from His presence. Verily, thy Lord is He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا زینل یذکرک مالک العلل و سلطان الملل علی الجبل فضلا من لدنه ان ربک لهو
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
